description_long: This object is a realistic representation of a crab, featuring a broad, slightly domed carapace with a pale beige to off-white coloration and subtle brown markings. The crab has two prominent, robust claws (chelae) at the front, which are darker at the tips and lighter at the base, and eight slender walking legs that taper to points. The underside of the crab is visible in some views, showing a segmented abdomen tucked beneath the carapace. The surface of the shell appears hard and slightly textured, with a matte to semi-gloss finish. No antennae or eyes are distinctly visible in these images, but the anatomical structure is consistent with common urban-dwelling or market crabs.
description: A pale, hard-shelled crab with two large claws and eight slender legs, featuring a slightly domed carapace and subtle brown markings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the broad carapace, both large claws extended, and the underside of the crab partially visible.
description_view_1: Angled rear-side view highlighting the curvature of the shell, the arrangement of the legs, and the side of one claw.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the crab's profile, all eight legs, and the tucked abdomen beneath the carapace.
description_view_3: Angled front-side view emphasizing the size and shape of the claws and the segmentation of the underside.
